text.title: Spring Boot Patterns Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology — apply reactive patterns; blocking JPA is forbidden
skip-this-methodology — annotations differ; pattern translates conceptually but not literally

branch.question: Field injection found in any bean?

conclusion.verdict: convert to constructor injection before anything else

branch.question: Custom error shape in any handler?

conclusion.verdict: apply remaining rules — @Transactional on service + advice-not-per-controller

text.example: stack=webmvc_blocking → field_injection=true → constructor-injection → flip @Autowired fields to constructor before touching anything else.
